name: Run Full CRISPR Workflow
description: Runs a full Cas9 CRISPR workflow: resolves a target sequence from raw DNA, local resource, or gene name plus organism; designs Cas9 guides; selects one protospacer; designs cloning oligos for a chosen vector; creates a sequence_build construction file; and validates the resulting construction inputs.

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: Raw DNA sequence, local resource name, or gene symbol to resolve.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Organism name used when query must be fetched from NCBI. Default: Escherichia coli.

inputs.name: vector
inputs.description: Vector preset name to use for cloning oligo design, such as px330.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Optional final construct name to include in construction inputs.

inputs.name: guide_index
inputs.description: Zero-based guide index to select from the designed Cas9 guide list. Default: 0.

inputs.name: validate_strict
inputs.description: Whether validation should raise on biological validation failures. Default: false.

outputs.description: A full workflow result containing sequence_info, guides, selected_guide, cloning, construction_file_inputs, construction, and validation.
